overall.description: A third-person horror game sequence where a character in a Japanese school uniform explores a dark traditional Japanese temple and house at night, holding a lantern to illuminate wooden corridors, dining rooms, and kitchens while discovering blood stains and dusty abandoned rooms.

character ascends the stone steps toward the temple entrance

stone guardian statue flanking the entrance stairs
stone guardian statue flanking the entrance stairs
traditional stone lantern illuminating the pathway
traditional stone lantern illuminating the pathway

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a traditional Japanese temple gate at night, holding a lantern. Stone guardian statues flank the entrance stairs, and stone lanterns provide ambient illumination along the cobblestone pathway.

segments.scene_description: The character enters the temple building and proceeds down a narrow wooden corridor. The hallway features traditional shoji screens and dark wooden beams, illuminated only by the character's lantern.

events.description: character enters the dining room through the sliding door

segments.scene_description: The character enters a traditional Japanese dining room with tatami flooring and a low round table set with dishes. A wooden cabinet stands against the left wall while a wall clock hangs on the right, all illuminated by a single overhead light.

character enters the kitchen area with visible blood stains on the floor

dark red blood stains splattered on the wooden floor

segments.scene_description: The character exits the dining room and moves through a transitional space toward the kitchen. Blood stains become visible on the wooden floor, and the lighting shifts to a dimmer, more ominous tone as the character approaches the kitchen area.

scene_state.functional_zone: old kitchen with shelves and utility sink

events.description: character discovers extensive blood stains on the kitchen floor

agents.ego_description: exploring the kitchen area, examining the shelves and sink while noticing blood stains on the floor

entered.detail: vintage yellow radio sitting on the kitchen counter
blue utility sink basin under the shelves
small wooden stool in front of the counter
low wooden cabinet with glass doors

segments.scene_description: The character explores a dimly lit kitchen featuring wooden shelves, a blue utility sink, and a vintage yellow radio. Blood stains are visible on the wooden floor, creating a disturbing atmosphere as the character moves toward the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep wooden staircase to upper floor

events.description: character begins ascending the wooden stairs to the upper floor

agents.ego_description: climbing the steep wooden staircase to the second floor, holding the railing

simple wooden handrail along the staircase
small wooden side table at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep, narrow wooden staircase to the upper floor. The lighting becomes dimmer as the character climbs, gripping the wooden railing while passing a small table at the landing.

scene_state.functional_zone: dusty abandoned upper room with scattered belongings

events.description: character enters the upstairs room filled with dust and scattered items

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dusty, abandoned upstairs room with tatami flooring and scattered cushions. Dust motes float in the light beam from the ceiling fixture, and a shoji screen window reveals trees outside. Books and papers are strewn across the floor, suggesting a hurried departure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the open courtyard of a traditional Japanese temple into the claustrophobic, blood-stained depths of an abandoned residence. It begins by approaching a temple gate flanked by stone guardian statues and lanterns before gliding through a narrow wooden corridor lined with shoji screens. The scene then opens into a lit dining room with tatami flooring and a low table, but the atmosphere shifts as the camera moves toward the kitchen, where the lighting dims and blood stains appear across the wooden floor beside a blue utility sink and vintage radio. As the camera ascends a steep, narrow staircase into deepening shadows, it finally enters a dusty upstairs room where scattered papers and floating dust motes suggest a hurried departure.
